expected: For legacy opportunities with pipelineId=null but a known stageId, the deal card resolves the pipeline from the current stage and renders all stages in that pipeline with real labels.
redEvidence: corepack pnpm --filter @kiss-pm/web test -- src/crm/deals/deal-card-surface.test.ts -> RED: resolveOpportunityPipelineId was not exported/implemented, so legacy pipeline fallback was absent.
greenEvidence: corepack pnpm --filter @kiss-pm/web test -- src/crm/deals/deal-card-surface.test.ts -> 19 files / 259 tests passed; helper test verifies legacy pipeline fallback and explicit pipeline precedence.
fixApplied: Added resolveOpportunityPipelineId/stagesForOpportunity and made DealCardBody use the effective pipeline derived from opportunity.pipelineId or, for legacy rows, from the current stage's pipelineId.
regressionRisk: Low. Explicit opportunity.pipelineId remains authoritative; fallback only affects legacy null pipelineId rows with a stageId. Full browser route traversal remains tracked separately as RISK-FULL-BROWSER-TRAVERSAL.
